Takes 27 frames to cancel with shield. 29 frame fist pump animation after a hit.

Damage-based armor on frame 7—94. Frame 47 is the earliest you can cancel the move. To knock Snake off of Cypher you need to do 7% damage in doubles or 8.4% damage in singles with a single hit. To destroy the Cypher with multiple hits, it takes 13% in doubles and 15.6% in singles.
Lasts 26.6 seconds until it blows up on its own.

landing_lag: Total frames includes 13 frames of hitlag.
